hero.title: What if AI worked for your teams, not against them?
hero.subtitle: Proxiwave integrates artificial intelligence into your existing business processes. No lengthy training. No brutal changes. Just your teams, more efficient.

approach.title: We don't ask you to change. We adapt.
approach.block1_text: Your teams keep working as usual. We build tools around their practices, not the other way around.
approach.block2_text: We integrate AI directly into your everyday tools. No technical skills needed to benefit from it.
approach.block3_text: Repetitive tasks automated, data leveraged, decisions accelerated. Measurable results in weeks.

results.title: What it looks like, concretely.
results.case1_result: Consultants focus on consulting, not paperwork.
results.case2_result: Floor managers see everything in real time, without changing their habits.
results.case3_result: Sales teams only handle hot contacts.

process.title: 3 steps. No surprises.
process.step1_text: We meet your teams, understand their processes, their daily pain points.
process.step2_text: We create tailored solutions, testable in weeks. No never-ending projects.
process.step3_text: We stay by your side. We adjust, optimize, and evolve with you.
process.reassurance: First call is free, no strings attached. We'll honestly tell you if we can help.

contact.title: Let's talk about your case.
contact.subtitle: A 30-minute call is enough to understand if we can help.
contact.message_placeholder: In a few words, what is your main challenge today?
contact.error: Something went wrong. Try again or contact us directly.

project.ideas_cta_subtitle: Share your suggestions, every idea helps improve the project.
